title: HTTYD Boars
description: Overhauls pigs to visually match the boar design seen in the HTTYD series.
body:
Overhauls pigs to visually match the boar design seen in the HTTYD series. This is intended to be used alongside monozari1's lovely [Berkian Cattle](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/berkian-cattle) resource pack, but you can use it on it's own if you want.

This resource pack requires [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) in order to work properly. If the model in game appears to be missing several cubes, try installing [EntityModelShaderFix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/entitymodelshaderfix), especially if you're using Oculus.

Feel free to use this in modpacks but please leave the resource pack intact (not combined or split up) and that my name is still visible on the pack description. Thank you, and enjoy!
